typography.instructions: Use DM Sans for all body text, UI elements, buttons, and functional labels. Use Cormorant Garamond strictly for large display headers, elegant greetings, and prominent venue/RM names to inject a high-end editorial feel. For headers, use lighter weights (font-light or font-normal) and italicize selectively for elegance. Never use generic bold sans-serif for main titles.

colors.instructions: Do not use arbitrary gray scales. Use the defined palette. #F8F7F4 is the app background. #F4F1EC is for secondary containers or subtle distinction. Pure white (#FFFFFF) is for floating cards to contrast against the background. #0B0B0D is the near-black for primary text, active states, and dominant dark cards (like the Case Hero). #D4B36A (gold) is for subtle accents, thin progress lines, and active tab indicators. Do not overuse gold.

rules: Mobile-first responsive design. Assume iPhone Safari constraints.
Use massive spacing between major sections: py-8, py-12.
Internal card padding must be generous: p-5 or p-6, never cramped.
Containers must have border-black/5 to define edges instead of heavy drop shadows.
Never center align long text; stick to left alignment for readability.
Use Safe Area padding (pb-safe, pt-safe) for iOS notch and home indicator support.

bottom_tab_bar.style: Glassmorphic floating or sticky bottom. bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-black/5.
bottom_tab_bar.interaction: Inactive icons are text-black/40. Active icons are text-dark with a tiny gold dot underneath. No bulky background pills on active state.
bottom_tab_bar.padding: pb-8 pt-4 px-6 (to account for iOS home indicator)

header.style: Sticky top, bg-[#F8F7F4]/90 backdrop-blur-md z-50. Minimalist. Left-aligned back button or profile picture. Center title should be DM Sans, tracking-widest, uppercase, text-xs, text-black/60.

cards.case_hero: Dominant dark card. bg-[#0B0B0D] text-[#F4F1EC]. rounded-3xl, p-6. Display the venue name in Cormorant Garamond. Use a thin gold (#D4B36A) line for the progress bar.
cards.rm_card: Pure white bg-[#FFFFFF], rounded-2xl, p-4, 1px border border-black/5. Soft ambient shadow shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]. Circular profile image overlapping slightly.
cards.list_items: For payments and timeline: Minimalist rows. No background container. Just border-b border-black/5 with py-4.

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). bg-[#0B0B0D] text-[#F4F1EC] font-medium. Hover: bg-black/80. transition-all duration-300.

forms_and_inputs.style: Clean lines. border-b border-black/10 only, no full boxes for inputs, OR highly rounded soft inputs bg-white border-none shadow-sm. Use Shadcn but override the standard Vercel look.

CustomerHome.description: Dashboard for logged-in user with active case.
CustomerHome.layout: 1. Elegant Greeting (Cormorant Garamond). 2. Case Hero Card (Dark). 3. Pending Actions (Horizontal snap scrollable pills/cards). 4. Latest RM Message snippet (Floating white card with RM avatar).

CustomerCaseDetail.description: Center of the product. The active booking.
CustomerCaseDetail.layout: 1. Immersive Hero Image of Venue (top, bleeding to edges, overlaid with back button). 2. Floating Case Status Card overlapping the image. 3. Minimalist Accordions (border-b only) for Shared Files, Payments, Timeline. 4. Sticky bottom action bar 'Message RM'.

EnquiryForm.layout: 1. Subtle step indicator (thin lines bg-black/10, active bg-gold). 2. 'Choose your Concierge' header. 3. Horizontal snap-scrolling list of large RM portrait cards. 4. Selection highlights card with a gold border. 5. 'Confirm Selection' floating button.

Messages.layout: Clean chat interface. Background #F8F7F4. User bubbles: bg-[#0B0B0D] text-[#F4F1EC]. RM Bubbles: bg-[#FFFFFF] text-[#0B0B0D] border border-black/5. Time stamps very small, text-black/40.

rules: Use micro-interactions for feedback. scale-[0.98] on button active.
Page transitions should be subtle crossfades or slide-ups, not jarring jumps.
Do NOT use transition-all. Use specific properties (transition-colors, transition-transform).

relationship_managers.description: Professional female concierge in grey suit
Professional male concierge in black suit

rules: Minimum touch target size of 44x44px for all interactive elements.
Sufficient contrast for text (e.g., #0B0B0D on #F8F7F4 is excellent).
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'DM Sans' via Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement the custom colors in tailwind.config.js.
Do not use transparent backgrounds without a blur filter for components that overlap content.
Ensure Shadcn components are modified to reflect the #0B0B0D dark tone and #D4B36A gold accents, replacing default Vercel blue/gray.
Do not center-align the main App container. Respect the mobile-first left-aligned natural reading flow.
Maintain the existing React, FastAPI, MongoDB stack and ensure no backend APIs are broken. All APIs already exist.
Use Lucide React for icons with stroke-width 1.5 for a finer, more elegant look.
Build the UI in .js files as requested.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetic. Create depth with z-index hierarchy and glass-morphism.
Do not apply universal transition: all.
Do not add .App { text-align: center; } in CSS.
Use modern pill-shaped or rounded-full buttons.
Never use AI assistant emojis for icons.
Use generous spacing (2-3x more than usual).
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
Prioritize named exports for components, default for pages.
